name: paget
description: Paget - AI-powered page agent with reflection-before-action

scripts.predev: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run build:bookmarklet
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shared,pc,llm,server,ui -c blue,cyan,yellow,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @paget/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @paget/page-controller dev" "pnpm --filter @paget/llm dev" "pnpm --filter @paget/server dev" "pnpm --filter @paget/ui dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:deps && concurrently "pnpm --filter @paget/server build" "pnpm --filter @paget/ui build" "pnpm --filter @paget/website build"
